title: Min Cost To Connect All Points
hints: The goal is to connect all points with the minimum total edge weight without forming cycles, which defines a Minimum Spanning Tree.
You can use Prim's algorithm or Kruskal's algorithm to find the Minimum Spanning Tree of the complete graph formed by the points.
Since the graph is complete, explicitly storing all edges is inefficient. Instead, maintain the minimum distance from the current tree to each unvisited point and greedily add the closest one.
